experience
cognizant · google client · 2021–present
Software Engineer
Cognizant — Google Client
Jan 2024 – Present
+
  • Developed enterprise Angular applications (v14–v16) using TypeScript and RxJS for 4,000+ internal Google users.
  • Built reusable Angular component libraries and dynamic forms, reducing engineering effort by 30%.
  • Implemented lazy-loaded modules, route guards, and API interceptors, improving load performance by 50%.
  • Wrote Jasmine/Karma unit & integration tests achieving 90% code coverage and cutting post-release bugs by 40%.
  • Improved UI rendering using Change Detection (OnPush), memoization, and optimized RxJS streams.
  • Automated a manual Angular workflow, reducing repetitive tasks and improving team efficiency.
Jr. Software Engineer
Cognizant — Google Client
Nov 2022 – Jan 2024
+
  • Developed Angular components, custom pipes, and reactive forms ensuring cross-browser compatibility.
  • Migrated legacy modules from JavaScript to TypeScript, improving maintainability and performance.
  • Implemented RxJS-based pagination, filtering, and debounce search for efficient data handling.
  • Enhanced MySQL database efficiency by optimizing queries — 50% faster data retrieval.
  • Migrated legacy modules to strict-mode TypeScript improving maintainability.
Programmer Analyst Trainee
Cognizant — Google Client
Nov 2021 – Nov 2022
+
  • Assisted in developing internal web applications for reviewers using Angular and TypeScript.
  • Built modular Angular components with reusable services and directives, improving code reusability.
  • Developed interactive forms and category-based data-fetching features for enhanced user experience.
  • Participated in Agile sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and Git-based version control collaboration.

key achievements
impact at scale
💰

$40,000 Annual Savings

Built an internal automation at Google eliminating manual overhead — saving $40K/year in engineering time.

📦

40% Bundle Reduction

Reduced Angular bundle size by 40% using tree-shaking, code splitting, and targeted build optimizations.

Component-Driven Architecture

50% Faster Load Times

Route guards, lazy modules, and API interceptors cut initial load performance by half for 4,000+ users.

about

I'm Mani — an Angular developer focused on enterprise-grade applications, clean architecture, and performance. Four years at Cognizant working on Google's internal tools taught me how to ship scalable UIs at speed.

I care about code that lasts: testable, readable, and fast. Whether it's RxJS streams, OnPush rendering, or lazy routing — I bring engineering discipline to every Angular app.

engineering philosophy
  • Reusability over repetition — build once, use everywhere.
  • Performance is a feature — measure, don't guess.
  • Test coverage is confidence, not a metric.
  • Clean architecture scales; hacks don't.
let's build

Open to Angular developer roles, fullstack positions, and high-leverage contracts. If you value clean code, performance, and scalable architecture — let's talk.
